meta.title: LaMoGe | Geological Modelling Laboratory
meta.description: Bilingual institutional landing page for the Geological Modelling Laboratory (LaMoGe), IDEAN, UBA-CONICET.

hero.title: Geological Modelling Laboratory
hero.subtitle: Advanced research in tectonics, geodynamics and integrated geological modelling.
hero.summary: LaMoGe combines analogue and numerical modelling, structural geology, data analysis and scientific training to address complex geological problems with academic and institutional projection.

about.title: A laboratory for research, training and geoscientific knowledge transfer
about.description: LaMoGe is conceived as an interdisciplinary platform to study geological and tectonic processes through experimentation, simulation and quantitative analysis.
about.mission: To develop frontier research in geological modelling, strengthen scientific training and provide applied tools for real-world geological problems.
about.vision: To become a regional and international reference node in geological modelling, geodynamics and applied experimentation.
about.history: This is a professional placeholder. Replace it with a concise history of the laboratory, institutional milestones and the evolution of its capabilities.
about.institution: Laboratory belonging to the Instituto de Estudios Andinos Don Pablo Groeber (IDEAN), academically linked to the University of Buenos Aires and CONICET.

activities.title: What we do
activities.description: Experimental and computational research, geological interpretation, teaching, institutional collaboration and specialized services.
